source_code:
# source: https://github.com/attardi/wikiextractor/issues/144
# repo: attardi/wikiextractor
# title: Another UnicodeDecodeError
# 
# This issue seems to be different from https://github.com/attardi/wikiextractor/issues/142
# EDIT: Sorry, but it's the same as https://github.com/attardi/wikiextractor/issues/89
# In my case the problem is that the default input encoding on my system is not utf-8, but the template file seems to be written as utf-8 https://github.com/attardi/wikiextractor/blob/2a5e6aebc030c936c7afd0c349e6826c4d02b871/WikiExtractor.py#L2730
# So it creates the templates file with utf-8 encoding and later tries to load the file with my default system encoding which fails. Reading should explicitly specify utf-8 here as well https://github.com/attardi/wikiextractor/blob/2a5e6aebc030c936c7afd0c349e6826c4d02b871/WikiExtractor.py#L2882
# something like this should work
# and replace `openhook=fileinput.hook
